project.name: ACP
project.purpose: A reusable AI Collaboration Protocol that separates semantic reasoning from implementation while keeping repository metadata synchronized.

sourceOfTruth.conversationDependency: Previous conversations are not required to continue work.

agentRoles.semanticAgent: Owns semantic analysis, reasoning, dependency analysis, concept design, and Knowledge Model structure.
agentRoles.implementationAgent: Owns repository updates, validation, Metadata maintenance, serialization, and code generation.

currentMilestone: ACP became its own first ACP-managed repository.
knownRisks: No automated Markdown link checker is configured.
Future adopters may need starter templates for blank co-project metadata files.
nextExpectedTask: Maintain ACP metadata whenever the reusable protocol, repository structure, examples, or release status changes.
